_comment: Official Notion MCP server (hosted, OAuth). Read-only is credential-enforced — grant the integration read access to the pages/databases you want searchable; there is no read-only flag (see SETUP.md). Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
